scripts.dev: node scripts/merge-tracks.mjs && node scripts/flatten-tracks.mjs && node scripts/enrich-tracks.mjs && astro dev
scripts.prebuild: node scripts/merge-tracks.mjs && node scripts/apply-track-meta.mjs && node scripts/flatten-tracks.mjs && node scripts/expand-supplemental.mjs && node scripts/enrich-tracks.mjs
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=rushtracks --branch=main
